# Fallen Watchtower

## Theme

An abandoned watchtower overrun by harpies and raiders.

The skies are no longer safe.

## Biome Gameplay

Fallen Watchtower teaches:

- avoiding aerial attacks
- prioritizing ranged threats
- reacting to dive attacks
- fighting enemies from multiple directions

Unlike previous biomes, flying enemies constantly pressure the player.

Rule:
Flying enemies rarely stay in melee range.

---

# Watchtower Bandit

## Role

Basic Melee

## Difficulty

Easy

## Description

A lookout left behind after the tower fell.

## AI

- Runs directly toward the player.
- Never retreats.

## Basic Attack

Short Sword Slash

## Ability

None

Simple frontline enemy.

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Attack
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- dust

## SFX

- footsteps
- sword swing

---

# Harpy

## Role

Flying Harasser

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

Fast flying predator.

Constantly attacks from above.

## AI

- Circles around the player.
- Rarely lands.
- Uses dive attacks.

## Basic Attack

Claw Swipe

## Ability

Dive Strike

Quickly dives toward the player.

Effects

- medium damage
- immediately returns to the air

Cooldown

6 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle Fly
- Fly
- Attack
- Dive
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- feather trail
- wind effect

## SFX

- wing flap
- screech
- claw attack

---

# Plague Harpy

## Role

Flying Caster

## Difficulty

Medium

## Description

A corrupted harpy spreading plague across the ruins.

## AI

- Maintains distance.
- Shoots poisonous projectiles.
- Occasionally dives.

## Basic Attack

Poison Feather

Projectile attack.

## Ability

Plague Cloud

Creates a poisonous area.

Effects

- damage over time
- lasts 6 seconds

Cooldown

10 seconds.

## Required Animations

- Idle Fly
- Fly
- Cast
- Dive
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- poison cloud
- green particles
- corrupted feathers

## SFX

- corrupted screech
- poison burst

---

# Watchtower Overseer

## Role

Biome Boss

## Difficulty

Boss

## Description

Former commander of the watchtower, now ruling the skies alongside the harpies.

## AI

- Commands nearby enemies.
- Uses ranged attacks.
- Controls battlefield.

## Basic Attack

Heavy Spear Slash

## Ability 1

Command Order

Buffs nearby allies.

Effects

- increased movement speed
- increased attack speed

## Ability 2

Signal Volley

Calls down a rain of arrows.

Several target circles appear before impact.

## Ability 3

Harpy Call

Summons two Harpies.

Cooldown

20 seconds.

## Phase 2

Triggered at 50% HP.

Changes

- Signal Volley becomes larger.
- Harpies attack more frequently.

## Phase 3

Triggered at 25% HP.

Overseer abandons defensive tactics.

Effects

- attacks faster
- summons immediately after cooldown
- more aggressive melee behavior

## Required Animations

- Idle
- Walk
- Run
- Heavy Attack
- Cast / Command
- Roar / Shout
- Death

## Optional Animations

- Hit

## VFX

- command aura
- arrow rain markers
- summon effect

## SFX

- command shout
- arrows
- horn
- impact
